extracted.source_phrase: Public Hours The museum will be open the following times during the World Stamp Expo week: Wed. 5/20 & Thurs. 5/21 — 12PM to 5PM Mon. 5/25 — 10AM to 8PM Thu. 5/28 — 10AM to 8PM Sun. 5/31 — 12PM to 4PM
